# Copilot custom instructions for `mcp-env-keychain`

When reviewing pull requests in this repository, perform a normal review
of the actual diff and any relevant changed files. Base feedback on the
code and configuration changes in the pull request.

Provide concise, actionable findings when you identify real issues.
Do not fabricate comments, force a fixed number of comments, or use a
predetermined review outcome. If no issues are found, it is acceptable
to have no findings.

Keep feedback specific to the changed code, prioritizing correctness,
security, reliability, and maintainability.

Reference for the code-review feature:
<https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/how-tos/use-copilot-agents/request-a-code-review/use-code-review#example>
